Édouard Vuillard

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Under the Trees (from "The Public Gardens")
by Édouard Vuillard
France, 19th century · 1894 · distemper on fabric
On the Pont de l'Europe
by Édouard Vuillard
France, 19th century · 1899 · color lithograph
Café Wepler
by Édouard Vuillard
France, late 19th-early 20th Century · c. 1908–10, reworked in 1912 · oil on fabric
